spec_match.rationale: Path examples use valid closed contours and star/diamond now use actual shape() commands rather than mislabeled polygon() values.

interactive.rationale: Circle, arch, star, wave, and diamond controls update native geometry, code output, fallback messaging, and pressed state.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The editorial layout visibly wraps prose around path() and responsive shape() contours.

edge_cases.rationale: Each selected value is tested independently; unsupported shape() values use a visibly honest polygon fallback.

references.rationale: The feature index and adjacent path()/shape() demonstrations are linked.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Screenshots of circle, star, and diamond plus all-control exercise show text outside the clipped geometry with no circle overlap.

accessibility.rationale: All selector buttons expose mutually exclusive aria-pressed state.

design_system.rationale: Shape margin gives readable separation while retaining the shared magazine/paper visual style.

summary: Corrected the circle path so its exclusion contour matches the visible circle, added shape-margin, converted mislabeled star/diamond polygons to real shape() syntax, and verified every selector.
